design_note: Each of the 17 approved Affiliate endpoints has exactly 40 functional test cases. Missing and invalid inputs are split into separate granular cases rather than lumped into generic validations.

test_cases.test_description: Verify Service Provider can create an external affiliate from an approved onboarding case.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized Service Provider; onboarding case APPROVED; bank exists.
test_cases.input_data: affiliateType=EXTERNAL, onboardingCaseId, legalName, shortName, adminContact, selectedBankIds.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.
test_cases.expected_result: 200; affiliate created with affiliateId, tenantId, status and createdAt.
